ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., recruiting, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer type */,
  "icd10_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 code for the cancer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_stages" (
  "cancer_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer stage */,
  "cancer_stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer stage */,
  "cancer_stage_description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer stage */,
  "tnm_staging" TEXT /* TNM staging for the cancer stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathologic_tnms" (
  "pathologic_tnm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathologic TNM staging */,
  "pathologic_tnm_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathologic TNM staging */,
  "pathologic_tnm_description" TEXT /* Description of the pathologic TNM staging */,
  "t_category" TEXT /* T category of the pathologic TNM staging */,
  "n_category" TEXT /* N category of the pathologic TNM staging */,
  "m_category" TEXT /* M category of the pathologic TNM staging */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathologic_tnm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  "prescribing_doctor" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who prescribed the treatment */,
  "treatment_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the treatment (e.g., Complete Response, Partial Response) */,
  "adverse_effects" TEXT /* Adverse effects observed during the treatment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the treatment outcome */,
  "outcome_status" TEXT /* Status of the outcome (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Description of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., Active, Completed, Suspended) */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the trial */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the trial */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator of the trial */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., randomized, double-blind) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_trials" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient trial enrollment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was enrolled in the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the patient's enrollment (e.g., Active, Completed, Withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_trials_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition or disease */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the medical history */,
  "physician" TEXT /* Name of the physician who treated the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator */,
  "investigator_email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "investigator_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigator_triads" (
  "triad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator triad */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "co_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-investigator */,
  "sub_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("triad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigator_triads_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigator_triads_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigator_triads_co_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigator_triads_sub_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id")
)
